notableEvents.label: Starling Marte pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Starling Marte flies out to right fielder Jordan Walker.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Alec Burleson singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Isaac Collins. Masyn Winn scores. Iván Herrera to 3rd. Alec Burleson to 2nd. Alec Burleson advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by catcher Elias Díaz.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Alec Burleson singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Isaac Collins. Masyn Winn scores. Iván Herrera to 3rd. Alec Burleson to 2nd. Alec Burleson advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by catcher Elias Díaz.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Isbel GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Isbel grounds into a double play, second baseman Thomas Saggese to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Isaac Collins out at 2nd. Kyle Isbel out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Iván Herrera batting, Victor Scott II picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, second baseman Michael Massey.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Pagés GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Pagés grounds into a double play, third baseman Maikel Garcia to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Nathan Church out at 2nd. Pedro Pagés out at 1st.
